description_long: This is a large, heavily armored tracked combat vehicle resembling a main battle tank, featuring a long, prominent cannon extending from a rotating turret. The hull is angular with sloped armor plating, and the turret is centrally mounted with visible hatches and periscopes. The vehicle rides on a set of wide, robust tracks with multiple road wheels on each side, providing stability and traction over rough terrain. The surface is finished in a uniform, matte gray color, with no visible camouflage patterns or military markings. The turret appears to have a secondary mount, possibly for a machine gun, though no weapon is currently attached. The overall design emphasizes protection, firepower, and mobility, suitable for urban or battlefield environments.
description: A large, gray, tracked combat vehicle with a long cannon, sloped armor, and a central turret. It features robust tracks and a matte finish, designed for heavy-duty tactical use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the cannon, the sloped turret, and the detailed track system with multiple road wheels.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the sloped frontal armor, the central position of the turret, and the width of the tracks.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the turret, cannon, and track assembly.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the turret, the rear armor, and the track system extending the full width of the vehicle.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One main cannon mounted on the turret front; one secondary mount on the turret roof, likely for a machine gun.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, sloped armor plating on the hull and turret; no visible modular or reactive panels.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: None visible; solid matte gray color.
